scripts.build: npm run build -w kata-1 && npm run build -w kata-2/api && npm run build -w kata-2/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w kata-1 && npm run test -w kata-2/api && python -m unittest discover -s kata-4/tests -p "test_*.py"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w kata-1 && npm run typecheck -w kata-2/api && npm run typecheck -w kata-2/web
